channel.title: AISight — AI Capital Expenditure Tracker
channel.description: Latest news and data on AI infrastructure spending across 38 companies. Updated 3x daily from SEC filings and earnings calls.

item.title: Meta buys humanoid robot startup Assured Robot Intelligence as 8,000 job cuts loom
item.description: Meta Platforms has acquired Assured Robot Intelligence, a humanoid robot AI startup, as CEO Mark Zuckerberg raises capital spending to $145 billion and prepares to lay off 8,000 employees to fund the company's artificial intelligence push. [Meta, Intel]

item.title: AI Data Center Boom Drives $65 Billion Power Equipment Demand Amid Supply Chain Constraints
item.description: A report from Wood Mackenzie projects that U.S. spending on power generation equipment for data centers could reach $65 billion by 2030, more than triple the $20 billion recorded in 2025, according to a ZeroHedge analysis of the report [1]. Data center capaci…

item.title: India's data centre capacity likely to surge nearly six‑fold to 10.5 GW by FY31
item.description: India's data centre capacity is projected to grow nearly six-fold to 10.5 GW by FY2031, driven by AI adoption and data localization policies. This surge will necessitate over $60 billion in capital expenditure, with a significant portion dedicated to power in…

item.title: Building trades unions join forces with tech giants in AI data center push
item.description: Building trades unions have long been considered a voice of the American worker. But they now are intertwined with the richest companies in the world as they create America’s artificial intelligence economy. Unionized workers are employed on massive data cent… [Intel, ServiceNow]

item.title: Wall Street says Oracle is a buy. The investors selling it can count to $300 billion.
item.description: Oracle’s stock has fallen nearly 50 per cent since hitting a record in September and dropped 14 per cent in the six sessions through Thursday, its worst stretch in months. Of the 51 Wall Street analysts tracked by Bloomberg who follow the company, 41 have buy… [Oracle]

item.title: GameStop eyes eBay takeover in audacious $46 billion bet on Ryan Cohen’s e-commerce vision
item.description: The video game retailer that meme traders saved from oblivion is now eyeing one of the internet’s oldest marketplaces. GameStop Corp is preparing a bid to acquire eBay Inc, according to a Wall Street Journal report published on 1 May 2026, sending eBay shares… [ServiceNow]

item.title: Meta’s Reality Labs reports $4B Q1 loss amid AI strategy shift
item.description: Meta's financial strain and AI strategy shift highlight challenges in maintaining tech leadership amid US-China competition and investor skepticism. The post Meta’s Reality Labs reports $4B Q1 loss amid AI strategy shift appeared first on Crypto Briefing. [Meta]

item.title: AI spending boom soars but no returns for big tech giants, warns Jefferies’ Chris Wood
item.description: Rising AI investments by global tech giants are straining cash flows, with capex nearing record levels relative to operating cash flow. Despite aggressive spending, monetisation remains uncertain, prompting concerns over profitability. Analysts warn the AI se…

item.title: Elon Musk says OpenAI abandoned ‘charity’ mission: Key takeaways from testimony
item.description: Elon Musk spent hours on the stand arguing that OpenAI strayed from its nonprofit roots, while defending his own AI ambitions and warning of existential risks. [OpenAI]

item.title: The company that built TikTok’s algorithm is now designing drugs for diseases pharma called undruggable
item.description: The company that built TikTok’s recommendation algorithm, the system that predicts with unsettling accuracy what a person wants to watch next, is now using a related class of AI to predict how molecules will behave inside a human body. ByteDance’s drug discov… [ByteDance, ServiceNow]

item.title: AI capex boom strains hyperscalers' cash flow as DRAM makers gain pricing power, says Jefferies
item.description: According to Jefferies, the four major US hyperscalers are projected to spend 92% of their operating cash flow on capex in 2026, up sharply from 41% in 2023

item.title: Cognizant to lay off employees as AI drives ‘real and accelerated change’
item.description: An internal memo cited “real and accelerated” industry shift as Cognizant trims costs, expands through Astreya acquisition, and channels savings into AI investments

item.title: Blackstone’s Steve Schwarzman built a program to teach young leaders about China. It’s harder to get into than Harvard
item.description: Inspired by the Rhodes Scholar program, Schwarzman's philanthropic initiative brings students in their early-to-mid-20s to spend a year immersed in understanding how China works. [Anthropic]
